Front Counter Associate (Full or Part-Time Positions)

Assist customers with service inquiries in a swift, proficient and friendly manner.  
Processing customer transactions. 
Resolving phone, walk-in, mail, fax, and email customer inquiries. 
Calling customers when garments are ready for pick-up. 

Seamstress (Full or Part-Time Positions)

Alter, mend, modify and construct garments and other articles according to customers’ specifications and needs. 
Replacing buttons, zippers, pockets, and linings to garments. 
Demonstrate sound knowledge of various fabrics and sewing techniques. 
Ensure that all tasks are completed in a timely manner. 

Hillary’s Cleaning is looking for experienced and friendly personnel to join our expanding team! For over 70 years we have been one of the top dry-cleaners in the industry due to our exceptional customer service. If you are enthusiastic, detail-oriented, and enjoying being a part of a team come join the Hillary’s family!  

We offer: 

Competitive wages 
Benefits 
Training 
Opportunity for advancement  

Please email your resume to info@hillarys.ca or fax to 613-798-7312.
